scope: ClickAudit and Fidget module-window chrome only

groups.purpose: Resizable module frame and active/inactive three-slice headers
Pin, unpin, minimize and close controls in every interaction state

exclusions: Audit and folder assets are cataloged but are not part of the first runtime pilot.
Complete 320x220 window shells are reference-only and must not be copied or stretched.
Preview boards, baked reference screens and baked labels are never runtime copy.
Existing ClickAudit and Fidget content dimensions and live content remain authoritative.
Canonical icons continue to come only from design/icon-source/k0rp-icons-v2.
No asset from design/ui-runtime/k0rp-v3 is replaced or reused by this allowlist.
